page: Microsoft Azure F64amds_v7 is a memory-intensive virtual machine from the Famdsv7 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 64 dedicated physical cores and 64 vCPUs powered by an AMD EPYC 9V45 processor with an x86_64 architecture operating at 4.5 GHz. The hardware configuration includes 512.0 GB of system memory, providing a high resource density of 8.0 GB of RAM per core. For local storage, the instance is equipped with 7559 GB of local disk capacity and is premium storage capable, while it does not include any GPU accelerators.

In benchmark evaluations, the F64amds_v7 demonstrates top-tier performance, placing in the top 10% for both single-core and multi-core stress-ng CPU tests. Its memory subsystem achieves top-tier read and write bandwidth, with uncached large-block read speeds reaching 412.42 GB/sec and write speeds at 193.26 GB/sec. The processor's instruction set extensions, including AVX-512 and cryptography accelerations like AES and SHA_NI, contribute to top-tier scores in Passmark CPU encryption and extended instruction tests. Database and memory-bound operations are highly efficient, as evidenced by Redis SET performance reaching 170.17 million operations per second and top-tier Passmark database operation scores.

Given its high memory-to-vCPU ratio and massive 7559 GB local storage capacity, this server offers strong qualitative cost efficiency for resource-intensive workloads that require substantial memory density without the added expense of GPU hardware. The combination of a high-frequency 4.5 GHz AMD EPYC CPU and large memory capacity makes it highly suitable for large-scale database deployments, in-memory caching systems, heavy data processing pipelines, and local-storage-heavy enterprise applications.
description: Microsoft Azure F64amds_v7 is a memory-intensive virtual machine powered by a 64-core AMD EPYC 9V45 processor operating at 4.5 GHz on an x86_64 architecture. It features 512.0 GB of RAM, yielding 8.0 GB per core, alongside 7559 GB of local storage. Operating on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this instance delivers top-tier performance across CPU, memory, and database benchmarks, placing in the top 10% for stress-ng multi-core and Redis SET operations. With no GPU accelerators, it represents a highly resource-dense configuration for memory-bound and storage-heavy workloads. It is optimized for large-scale databases, in-memory caching, and data-intensive enterprise applications.
og_description: Microsoft Azure F64amds_v7 is a memory-intensive server featuring 64 AMD EPYC vCPUs, 512 GB RAM, and 7559 GB local storage, delivering top-tier database and CPU benchmark performance.

tagline: A high-frequency, memory-intensive virtual machine featuring massive local storage and top-tier database processing capabilities for demanding enterprise workloads.
